docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $588.36 FILED BY BHATIA, ANKUR AS TO DEFENDANT KERR, VANESSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KERR, VANESSA

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AND MEDIATION. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT PAYS THE PLTF WITH A CASHIER'S CHECK IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NO SUCH NUMBER, UNABLE TO FORWARD
